name: The Entrance To Champs Elyses
description:
You are in the entrace to Champs Elysees, wich is a big forest of the city
of Paris, you can hear the singing of the birds and the noice of the air
passing though the branches of the trees. The trees are so tall that you 
cant see the top of them. At north there is a golden gate that has a note
written in it, if you are smart you would continue with out reading it.

extra_descriptions.description:
Danger do not enter you might get lost, and we dont make our self responsable
of what can happend to you. If you dear to enter we recoment you to visit the
historical center of Paris.
                N   E   N   W   S   W   N   W
